description: Right-side sliding panel for viewing asset/entity details. Triggered by clicking any table row or list item. Wide panel (860px) with dim backdrop, sidebar stats, entity relationship graph, tabbed content, and structured data field grids.

trigger.element: any table row (.drawer-demo-row) or list item
trigger.event: click on entire row — never a button inside the row

structure.drawer: div.ds-drawer (fixed right panel, slides from right)

header.title: ds-drawer-title — entity hostname/name, max-width:280px, overflow ellipsis
header.type_badge: ds-badge neutral — entity type (Host, Application, etc.)
header.actions: icon button (open full page) + Collapse button (closes drawer)

stat_cards.bar_fill: ds-drawer-stat-bar-fill — accent color; add .full class for 100% (green)

list.header: ds-drawer-list-header with count and search icon
list.items: ds-drawer-list-item — dot + entity name, active state = accent

entity_graph.canvas: 200px tall, dot-grid background (16px grid), SVG overlay
entity_graph.svg_content: Center entity node (accent, 28px radius) + radial remote nodes (22px) + bezier paths + count badges on paths
entity_graph.collapsible: Toggle via ds-drawer-graph-toggle button, adds .collapsed class to section
entity_graph.header: 'Entity Relationship Summary' + info icon + Collapse/Expand toggle

field_grid.border: right and bottom on each cell, none on last column / last row

classes.ds-drawer-title-row: Flex row: title + badges + score + actions
classes.ds-drawer-section: Content section with header + field grid

interactions.open: click .drawer-demo-row → openDetailDrawer(data) → overlay + drawer get .open class
interactions.tab_switch: dsDrawerTab(btn, panelId) — removes .active from all, adds to clicked
interactions.graph_toggle: dsDrawerToggleGraph() — adds .collapsed to graph section, swaps button icon/text
interactions.sidebar_click: stat card click = filter list; list item click = highlight active row

do: Trigger on full row click — entire <tr> is clickable with cursor:pointer
Always show dim backdrop (rgba 0,0,0,0.45) behind the drawer
Entity graph must be collapsible — default expanded
Render field grid with 4 columns — exactly 4 border-separated cells per row
Label in field is always 10px uppercase muted above value
Close on Escape key and backdrop click
Use ds-badge severity classes matching score: danger/warning/info/success
dont: Never use a full-screen modal for asset detail — always this drawer
Never omit the sidebar entity stats — gives critical relationship context
Never put the entity graph outside the collapsible graph section
Never hardcode hex colors — all CSS variables
Never remove tabs — even if only Summary is implemented, show all 6 tabs
Never trigger drawer on action button clicks (edit, delete) — only on row click
